description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 8th; Weight 3 lbs.; Price 21,324 gp DESCRIPTION A faint trail of sparks marks the passage of this +1 shock starknife whenever it is thrown. Once per day, its wielder may throw it so it transforms into an 8d6 lightning bolt ( Reflex DC 14 half), returning to its physical form at the end of the bolt’s path. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells lightning bolt; Cost 10,824 gp
